testcase.name: Validate login popup - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given User launches the Flipkart website....................................passed When User clicks Login button...............................................passed Then Login popup should appear..............................................passed

testcase.name: Validate page scrolling - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given User launches the browser and opens Flipkart website..................passed When User scrolls down the page.............................................passed Then Page should scroll successfully........................................passed

testcase.name: Validate mobile search functionality - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given User launches the browser and opens Flipkart website..................passed When User searches for "iPhone 15"..........................................passed Then User should navigate to the search results page........................passed

testcase.name: Validate mobile search functionality - Example #1.2
testcase.system-out: Given User launches the browser and opens Flipkart website..................passed When User searches for "Samsung"............................................passed Then User should navigate to the search results page........................passed

testcase.name: Validate mobile search functionality - Example #1.3
testcase.system-out: Given User launches the browser and opens Flipkart website..................passed When User searches for "Vivo"...............................................passed Then User should navigate to the search results page........................passed
